unit: Unit 12: Everyday Life with Your Mac
title: Social Media and Streaming
drDigitalIntro: Facebook, YouTube, Netflix, Apple TV+, and other services are accessed through Safari. You log in with your email and password. YouTube is free but has ads; Netflix and Apple TV+ charge subscriptions. Social media connects you to friends; streaming services provide movies and shows. Be aware of your privacy on social media — choose what information you share.
drDigitalSuccess: You can enjoy social media and streaming safely!
drDigitalHint: Use strong passwords for all accounts.
